prototype_status: Illustrative working prototype, not an official institutional forecast.
resident_pool_coverage: Projected resident four-year entrants divided by current first-time four-year intake.

channel_feasibility_prototype.low_required_growth: 10% or less of the current channel.
channel_feasibility_prototype.moderate_required_growth: Above 10% and no more than 35% of the current channel.

public_display_note: The website shows confidence categories but not numerical weights.
